description_long: This armchair features a bold, boxy silhouette with wide, angular armrests and a deep seat. The seat and backrest are upholstered in a vibrant red material with a tufted, diamond-patterned design, each tuft accentuated by matching buttons. The armrests and exterior surfaces are smooth and unadorned, providing a striking contrast to the plush, textured seating area. The backrest is tall and straight, offering substantial support, while the seat is generously padded for comfort. The legs are short and minimally visible, giving the chair a grounded, sturdy appearance. The overall design is modern and eye-catching, suitable for urban parks, plazas, or stylish public waiting areas.
description: A modern, boxy red armchair with tufted diamond-pattern upholstery and wide, angular armrests. The seat and backrest are plush and button-tufted, contrasting with the smooth exterior.
description_view_0: Front view shows the tufted seat and backrest with wide, flat armrests and a deep, inviting seat.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the smooth, solid armrest and the tufted side of the backrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displays a plain, unadorned back with a solid blocky form and no visible tufting.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the smooth armrest and tufted backrest side.
attribute_armrest_design: wide, flat, and smooth upholstered armrests
attribute_backrest_style: tall, straight, and tufted with diamond-patterned buttons
attribute_leg_type: short, block feet barely visible, likely wood or plastic
